positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial flora arrangement, featuring bioluminescent glowing mushrooms, crystalline roots, and delicate spiraling leaves, all arranged in a symmetrical, mandala-like pattern. The composition must be centralized and highly illustrative, designed for screen printing on fabric. Use deep midnight blues, vibrant cyan, electric purple, and subtle gold accents. The style is a fusion of intricate Art Nouveau patterns and clean, modern geometric engraving. Studio lighting, high contrast, perfect silhouette quality, ultra-crisp vector art feel, negative space emphasized.
